text:
Once upon a time in the serene small town of Willowbrook, there lived a boy named Oliver. Oliver had brown hair that curled at the edges, bright green eyes, and a perpetually boyish grin. He spent his days exploring the wooded trails beyond the edge of town and dreaming about adventures.

One spring day, as the cherry blossoms fell, Oliver found an old, weathered map hidden in the woods behind his house. The map was faded, marked with arrows, and featured a tiny, smudged emblem somewhere in the heart of a dense forest. Delighted, Oliver decided he had found the legendary treasure map of Willowbrook. It was the sort of treasure he envisioned for his own childhood tales.

Using the map as a guide, Oliver gathered his courage and ventured deeper into the forest. Each step seemed to lead him slightly further than the last until he reached a clearing. There stood an ancient oak tree with branches reaching towards the sky like arms.
